                                                                                                                     parentSchema.description
      1                                                                               A file with citation metadata for software or datasets.
      2                                                                                                                             A person.
      3                                                                                      Identifier for an author, see https://orcid.org.
      4                                                                                      Identifier for an author, see https://orcid.org.
      5              An entity, i.e., an institution, team, research group, company, conference, etc., as opposed to a single natural person.
      6              An entity, i.e., an institution, team, research group, company, conference, etc., as opposed to a single natural person.
      7              An entity, i.e., an institution, team, research group, company, conference, etc., as opposed to a single natural person.
      8              An entity, i.e., an institution, team, research group, company, conference, etc., as opposed to a single natural person.
      9                                                                                      Identifier for an author, see https://orcid.org.
      10                                                                                     Identifier for an author, see https://orcid.org.
      11                                                                                                                                 <NA>
      12                      The DOI of the work (i.e., 10.5281/zenodo.1003150, not the resolver URL http://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.1003150).
      13                                                                                                                                 <NA>
      14 SPDX license list; releaseDate=2021-05-14; source=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spdx/license-list-data/master/json/licenses.json
      15                                                                                                                                 <NA>
      16                                                                                                          An SPDX license identifier.
      17                                                                                                                                 <NA>
      18                                                                                                                                 <NA>
